name: ZkpVerifier

methods.name: update
methods.desc: Allow the creator to update the contract.

methods.name: delete
methods.desc: Allow the creator to delete the contract.

methods.name: setRegistryAppId
methods.desc:
Sets the Registry App ID.
Only the contract creator can call this.

methods.name: opUp
methods.desc:
No-op method to increase opcode budget.
This is used for OpUp transactions in atomic groups.

methods.name: verifyAndRegister

args.name: proof
args.desc: The 256-byte Groth16 proof bytes (A, B, C)

args.name: oracleData
args.desc: The data signed by the trusted oracles

args.name: oraclePubKeys
args.desc: Array of oracle public keys used for signing

args.name: oracleSignatures
args.desc: Array of digital signatures corresponding to the pubkeys

args.name: proofId
args.desc: The human-readable ID to associate with the verification

methods.desc:
Verifies a ZK proof and its associated M-of-N oracle signatures.
If valid, registers the user in the identity registry.

methods.name: updateMerkleRoot
methods.desc:
Admin method to update the Merkle Root of verified identities.
Only the contract creator can call this.

desc:
ZkpVerifier Contract
Verifies ZK proofs and oracle signatures.
Automatically updates the IdentityRegistry upon successful validation.

minOracleConsensus.desc: Minimum required oracle signatures for consensus (M-of-N)

merkleRoot.desc: The Merkle Root of verified identities

registryAppId.desc: The Application ID of the Identity Registry

usedNullifiers.desc: Storage for used nullifiers to prevent double-claiming (Identity Sybil protection)

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Only creator can update Merkle root
Oracle public keys must be unique
This identity has already registered a wallet
User not verified by ZK circuit
index access is out of bounds
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<bytes>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
